title: Goat Rider
description: Changes the "Dream" goat horn sound to HOG RIDER sound
body:
# Required Mods

None


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# 📥 Installation guide
 
1. Download the "Goat Rider" file

2. Open minecraft files and put "Goat Rider" here:
 .minecraft/resourcepacks/

3.Launch minecraft and go to:

Options - Resource Packs
and pick the "Goat Rider"

4. Wait for the Texturepack to load and play !

----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# ⚙️ Features

Changes the "Dream" goat horn sound to HOG RIDER sound
